creator: paulbeard@gmail.com
text:
I think I worked around it but can't recall how. Removing the port seems
logical if the distfile is no longer available or necessary. I'll see if I
can unearth my correspondence on it, retrace my steps.


On Tue, Jan 28, 2014 at 4:08 PM, Marcin WiÅnicki <mwisnicki@gmail.com>wrote:

> Sorry for not getting to this earlier. According to upstream
> maintainer/developer, Windows DDK license requires keeping drivers up to
> date with latest version of DDK (which cups-samba currently does not
> support) at all times. That sounds rather strange and I was unable to
> verify those claims but IANAL and I didn't try very hard. I'm not sure what
> to do next, perhaps this port should be removed.
>



-- 
Paul Beard / www.paulbeard.org/
